title: Tarkovchanin GUI
body:
# 📝 Description
Tarkovchanin GUI replaces GUI and sounds, making them more EFT-ish.

Inspired by Escape From Tarkov by Battlestate Games.

# ⚙ Features
- Explosions, chests, button click, footsteps, item pick up sounds from EFT
- New effect icons
- New GUI textures for inventory, hopper, chest and dispenser
- New hotbar
- Removed crosshair

**🖼 Check out gallery!**

# 🔥 Q&A
Q: Will there be any updates?

**A: Yes**

Q: Can I use this resourcepack for my needs?

**A: Yes**

Q: Can I edit this resourcepack?

**A: Yes**

Q: Can I reupload this resourcepack?

A: **Yes**, but you must specify me as the author.

# 📓 Plans
- Replace TACZ gun sounds with EFT gun sounds
